title: swertia piloglandulosa subsp. biovulata
intro: Swertia piloglandulosa subsp. biovulata, also known as a species of the Swertia genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing the immune system. The herbal preparations of Swertia piloglandulosa subsp. biovulata typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves to produce teas, infusions, or supplements that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
